title: I need a DevOps mentor before tomorrow
objective: I need a DevOps mentor before tomorrow.

tasks.title: Profile the mentorship need
tasks.description: Capture the target capability gap, time horizon, and preferred mentoring style.

tasks.title: Map required expertise
tasks.description: Identify the domain expertise and seniority signals required for the mentor.

tasks.title: Prepare mentor shortlist
tasks.description: Assemble the best mentor candidates with availability-aware rationale.

activity_feed: Intent Agent extracted the mission objective.
Mission Planner Agent generated executable tasks.
Skill Mapper Agent identified required capabilities.
People Discovery Agent prepared enterprise graph search scope.
Intelligence Agent initialized explainable ranking context.
Coordinator Agent prepared mission coordination actions.
Mission Tracker Agent published the initial mission state.

execution_timeline.summary: Mission request normalized and ready for structured extraction.
Required skills mapped for each task.
Enterprise knowledge graph search scope prepared.
Recommendation framework initialized with explainability requirements.
Mission state published to the dashboard timeline.
